```{=typst}
#pagebreak()
#wcg-ws-open(
  day: "Day 2", num: 2, title: "The purchase pause",
  purpose: "To give yourself ten quiet seconds before one automatic purchase.",
  how: [Choose one moment where buying tends to happen quickly. Before that
  purchase today, take about ten seconds. Breathe. Then fill this in — whether
  you bought the item or not.],
)

#wcg-panel(title: "Worked example")[
  *The moment:* Adding items to an online cart at night. \
  *During the pause I noticed:* I was tired and a little bored. \
  *What I chose:* Saved it to a list to look at tomorrow.
]

#wcg-field("The moment I chose to pause", lines: 1)
#wcg-field("What I noticed during the pause", lines: 1)

#wcg-group("Did I still want it after ten seconds?")
#grid(columns: (auto, auto, auto), column-gutter: 34pt,
  wcg-check("Yes"), wcg-check("Not sure"), wcg-check("No"))

#wcg-field("What I chose to do", lines: 1)
#wcg-field("Reflection — what happened when I paused?", lines: 1)

```

> **A gentle reminder.**
>
> A pause is not a "no." Sometimes you will still buy the thing, and that is
> perfectly fine. The pause just gives the choice back to you.

```{=typst}
#wcg-ws-footer()
```
